title: Create: Blueprint Block
description: Retexures bedrock and command blocks to allow you to make screenshots of your builds with cleaner backgrounds!
body:
Retexures the standard command block and bedrock to 2 different blocks that have the colors of the Create background. Used to make cleaner screenshots of builds for schematics.
![The blueprints blocks behind an andesite casing as the background.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53b9314880d711f62a3e2299573c69b20578472b.png)

I recommend downloading any mod that gives you fullbright to remove any shadows.

I also recommend downloading [an orthographic camera mod, like this one.](https://modrinth.com/mod/orthocamera) It's not needed, but makes your screenshots way nicer!

Most screenshots on this page use a FOV of 30.

I also made [this downloadable schematic](https://createmod.com/schematics/blueprint-schematic-room) for the 2x2 blocks, since they are a bit difficult to work with.
